channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: White House Outlines Iran Military Objectives Without Addressing Support for Iranian People
item.description: In the wake of recent US military action against Iran, the White House has outlined its objectives, but made no mention of supporting the Iranian people or promoting regime change. Press Secretary Kar...

item.title: Why India Prefers Russian and French Fighter Jets Over American Ones
item.description: India has consistently avoided purchasing American fighter jets despite multiple offers over the past two decades. The historical reasons trace back to the Cold War, when the United States supplied Pa...

item.title: Dalawang Tao ang Namatay at Apat ang Nasugatan sa Pamamaril sa Loob ng Condominium sa Barangay Marcelo Green, Parañaque
item.description: Isang trahedyang pamamaril ang naganap sa loob ng isang pribadong condominium compound sa Barangay Marcelo Green, Parañaque City noong umaga ng Marso 5, 2026. Ayon sa ulat, dalawang indibidwal ang nas...

item.title: Woolworths Ventures reports strong half-year growth across multiple segments
item.description: Woolworths Ventures has posted double-digit sales growth in the half-year to December, highlighting the strength of its diversified portfolio. The Ventures division, which includes WCellar, WEdits, Ab...

item.title: Brighton vs Arsenal: Premier League leaders Arsenal aim to extend lead with Declan Rice fitness update
item.description: Arsenal continue their quest for the Premier League title as they travel to face Brighton, carrying a five-point advantage over Manchester City. Both clubs have a game in hand and will play simultaneo...

item.title: Finn Allen hits fastest T20 World Cup century as New Zealand beat South Africa to reach final
item.description: In a spectacular T20 World Cup semi-final in Kolkata, New Zealand’s Finn Allen smashed the fastest century in T20 World Cup history, helping his team overpower South Africa by nine wickets. Chasing a ...

item.title: Government Criticises PTI Boycott of National Security Briefing Amid Regional Tensions
item.description: The government of Pakistan has strongly criticised the opposition, mainly the PTI, for boycotting an important in-camera briefing on national security called by Prime Minister Shehbaz Sharif. The meet...

item.title: Tinubu Faces Pressure Over Police Leadership as Akande Pushes to Keep Fayoade
item.description: Reports from inside the Nigeria Police Force show say wahala don dey over who go dey lead as new Inspector-General of Police, Tunji Disu, don come in. Some Deputy Inspectors-General (DIGs) dey try lob...

item.title: Internal Review Reveals Liberal Party Struggles in 2025 Election
item.description: The Australian public has been granted access to an internal Liberal Party report reviewing the party’s disastrous 2025 election campaign. The report harshly criticises leader Peter Dutton, describing...

item.title: Sekhukhune United snatch late draw at Durban City
item.description: Sekhukhune United managed to rescue a point in a dramatic Betway Premiership clash against Durban City at Chatsworth Stadium on Wednesday evening. The match was played under light drizzle and heavy te...

item.title: Middle-aged man charged with defilement, abduction of 11-year-old girl in Bomet
item.description: A middle-aged man identified as Askew Kimutai Korir was arraigned at Sotik Principal Magistrate's Court on October 27, 2025, facing serious charges related to the sexual abuse of an 11-year-old Grade ...

item.title: Carney revises Canada’s stance on U.S.-led actions in Iran
item.description: Canadian Prime Minister Mark Carney initially expressed quick support for U.S. military action against Iran, aligning closely with President Donald Trump. This immediate endorsement placed Carney at o...

item.title: House Oversight Committee Expands Investigation, Summons Bill Gates and Leon Black to Testify on Epstein Ties
item.description: The U.S. House Oversight Committee has broadened its investigation into the associates of convicted sex trafficker Jeffrey Epstein and his close associate Ghislaine Maxwell. The committee, chaired by ...

item.title: US submarine torpedoes and sinks Iranian frigate off Sri Lanka in major escalation of conflict
item.description: In a dramatic escalation of the ongoing US-Iran war, a United States Navy attack submarine has sunk an Iranian warship using a torpedo in international waters off the southern coast of Sri Lanka. US D...

item.title: Interesting Facts About Joaquin Arce: Achievements and Personal Life
item.description: Joaquin Arce, currently a rising housemate on Pinoy Big Brother Celebrity Collab Edition 2.0, has captured attention not just for his presence on the show but also for his achievements and values. Kno...

item.title: Rivers United climb back to NPFL top with 3-0 win over El-Kanemi
item.description: Rivers United don waka come back to the top of the Nigeria Premier Football League (NPFL) table after dem beat El-Kanemi Warriors 3–0 on Wednesday. With this win, Rivers United get 49 points from 26 m...

item.title: UK Government Introduces Voluntary Action Plans for Employers on Menopause Support and Gender Pay Gap Reporting
item.description: The UK Government, led by Minister for Women and Equalities Bridget Phillipson, has announced the launch of action plans aimed at addressing the gender pay gap and improving support for women experien...

item.title: DMK and Congress Finalise Seat-Sharing Deal: Congress to Contest 28 Assembly Seats in Tamil Nadu Elections
item.description: The ruling Dravida Munnetra Kazhagam (DMK) in Tamil Nadu, led by Chief Minister M.K. Stalin, has successfully concluded a seat-sharing agreement with its long-time ally, the Indian National Congress, ...

item.title: Mark Carney’s Approach Raises Concerns About Canada’s Commitment to Gender Equality
item.description: As International Women’s Day approaches, concerns are growing over Canada’s commitment to gender equality under Prime Minister Mark Carney. Despite the 30th anniversary of the United Nations Beijing D...

item.title: Montreal Student Pilot Faces Charges After Home Crash Injures Two
item.description: A student pilot has been formally charged following an incident on Montreal’s South Shore where his aircraft crashed into a residential home. The crash resulted in injuries to both the pilot and a man...
